items.title: American Express Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
items.description: NEW YORK, September 24, 2025--The Board of Directors of American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.82 per common share, payable on November 10, 2025, to shareholders of record on October 10, 2025.

items.title: Cash King, Debt Light: Visa's Financial Muscle Tells the Story
items.description: V's $17.1 billion cash, low debt and powerful free cash flow fuel growth, buybacks and market-leading profitability.

items.title: Investors Should Love the New American Express Platinum Card
items.description: American Express is rolling out a refreshed Platinum Card lineup at a time when its business fundamentals are strong.

items.title: Analyst Explains Why He’s Bullish on American Express (AXP) – ‘Millennials and GenZ Are in This Ecosystem’
items.description: We recently published These 10 Stocks are Buzzing After Important Analyst Calls. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is one of the stocks analysts were recently talking about.
